origin.title: From the Heart of Ecuador
origin.p1: Our cacao plantation is located in the Esmeraldas region of northwestern Ecuador – one of the most biodiverse tropical regions in the world. The humid climate, fertile volcanic soils, and proximity to the equator create ideal conditions for Cacao Fino de Aroma.
origin.p2: For more than 50 years, our family has cultivated this cacao with care and respect for nature. Grown on hilly terrain at a small to medium scale – pesticide-free, in harmony with the surrounding rainforest.
origin.p3: What grows here is no mass product. It is a cacao with history, character, and an aroma that speaks of the soil from which it comes.

process.title: From Tree to Bean
process.step1text: Ripe cacao pods are harvested by hand and opened. The cacao beans are carefully removed.
process.step2text: The beans ferment for several days in wooden boxes. This process develops the typical, complex aroma of fine cacao.
process.step3text: The beans are then sun-dried – slowly and gently, to preserve the aroma.
process.step4text: The dried beans are roasted and shelled. Roasting brings out the depth of flavour.
process.step5text: Grinding produces the liquid cacao mass. Pressing separates the cacao butter – the residue becomes the finest cacao powder.

products.title: What we offer
products.sub: All products come exclusively from our own plantation in Esmeraldas. No additives, no compromises.
products.p1desc: Cacao mass, a little cacao butter, and a small amount of sugar – finely conched and tempered. The result is a chocolate with exceptional aroma.
products.p2desc: Grinding roasted cacao beans produces a creamy, aromatic paste of 100 % cacao – without any additives.
products.p3desc: Fermented and sun-dried raw beans of premium quality. Sorted, cleaned, ready to eat.

contact.title: Business Enquiries
contact.sub: Interested in our products? We look forward to hearing from you.
